MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Kendra Crawfoard. Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for Plaintiff.
Defendants Tavai Naiuli, Iao Naivuli, Keila Naiuli and Primo Naiuli are present.
Attorney Jean Chung representing the defendants through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of DEC-5-2011 remains on calendar.
